commands: echo DEBUG-PWD: $(pwd) && ls -la && echo DEBUG-APPS: && ls -la apps 2>&1 && echo DEBUG-SCRAPER: && ls -la apps/instagram-scraper 2>&1

deploy.startCommand: export PUPPETEER_EXECUTABLE_PATH=$(which chromium) && node node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate deploy --schema apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma && node apps/backend/dist/index.js
